raw_text:
Manager, MLOps Engineering

We're hiring a Manager of MLOps Engineering to lead our platform engineering team responsible for

building and maintaining the infrastructure that powers ML deployment across our customer base. In

this role, you'll manage a team of 4-6 senior engineers, drive technical strategy for our MLOps

platform, and directly contribute to critical infrastructure projects. You'll mentor engineers, establish

best practices for model orchestration and monitoring, and partner with product leadership to

prioritize roadmap items that maximize customer impact.

About the Company

VectorFlow AI is a Series B machine learning infrastructure company that builds cloud-native

platforms enabling enterprises to deploy, monitor, and iterate on ML models in production. Founded
in 2019, we serve over 200 enterprise customers across fintech, healthcare, and e-commerce who

rely on our orchestration and governance tools to manage complex ML workflows at scale.

What You'll Own

1. Lead and mentor a team of 4-6 senior MLOps engineers, conducting 1-on-1s, performance

reviews, and career development planning

2. Architect and oversee the implementation of ML model orchestration infrastructure using Airflow

and Kubeflow for workflow scheduling and execution

3. Establish and enforce best practices for MLflow experiment tracking, model registry, and model

versioning across all production deployments

4. Design and implement comprehensive model monitoring solutions using specialized tools like
Fiddler or custom dashboards to detect data drift, performance degradation, and anomalies

5. Drive the adoption of feature store technology (e.g., Tecton or Feast) to standardize feature

engineering and reduce training-serving skew across teams

6. Manage Kubernetes infrastructure and deployment pipelines, ensuring high availability and

efficient resource utilization across ML workloads

7. Establish SLAs and monitoring protocols for production ML systems, including logging, alerting,

and incident response procedures

8. Work cross-functionally with product, data science, and security teams to define MLOps

platform requirements and roadmap priorities

at VectorFlow AI — Democratizing machine learning infrastructure at scaleSan Francisco, CA • Full-time • $210,000 - $270,000 base + equity + bonus 9. Participate in architectural decisions and code reviews for infrastructure components while

maintaining hands-on technical contribution

Perks & Benefits

Competitive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) with 90% company coverage for
employees
401(k) with 4% company match and immediate vesting
Equity package (stock options) with standard 4-year vesting
Flexible work policy with home office stipend ($500/year)
Professional development budget ($3,000/year for conferences, courses, training)
Unlimited PTO with a minimum of 15 days encouraged
Free access to LinkedIn Learning and industry certifications
Monthly team gatherings and quarterly company offsites

 Next Steps

Apply via our careers page at vectorflow.ai/careers or submit your resume and a cover letter

describing your MLOps leadership experience to careers@vectorflow.ai. Please include links to

public projects, GitHub profile, or examples of infrastructure work you're proud of. Submissions

reviewed on a rolling basis.
nice_to_have: engineering, or MLOps, with at least 2
